plan:
1. Initialize project with `npm init -y`, create `README.md`, and set up directory structure.
2. Install dependencies: `npm install express supertest node:crypto`.
3. Create `src/app.js` and `src/server.js` with proper exports.
4. Implement `src/lib/id.js` for generating unique IDs.
5. Create `src/lib/errors.js` for error handling.
6. Implement projects module routes and service.
7. Implement tasks module routes and service.
8. Implement members module routes and service.
9. Implement comments module routes and (if needed) service.
10. Add health check endpoint in `src/app.js`.
11. Write oracle tests using Supertest.
12. Run tests and fix any issues to ensure oracle tests pass.

This plan ensures all required files are created and the oracle tests are satisfied.
